premium.description: Annual premium charged for the one-year term insurance policy ($290). Used directly in the expected gain calculation as the gain when the customer survives, and as part of computing the net loss when the customer dies.

policy_amount.description: Face value of the one-year term insurance policy ($10,000). Used together with the premium to derive the net loss of -$9,710 (= 290 − 10,000) in the event of the customer's death.

prob_death.description: Probability of the customer's death during the next year (0.001). Used directly in the expected gain calculation, and its complement (0.999) is also used as the probability of survival.
